title: Get Free Key
subtitle: Complete the steps below to claim your free license key.
step1Desc: Complete the shortlink to verify you are human.
step1Instruction: Click the button below to open the shortlink. Once you finish, come back and click "I'm Done".
step2Desc: Solve the captcha to confirm your identity.
errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errorRateLimit: You've claimed too many keys. Please try again later.
keysHistorySub: Manage and generate your script authorization keys.
captchaDesc: Solve the captcha to confirm your identity.
shortlinkDesc: Choose one of the shortlink providers below to verify your access.
systemPaused: Free key system is currently paused by administrator
verifyingShortlink: Verifying shortlink completion. Please wait a moment.
keyClaimedDesc: Your license key is active and ready to use in your Roblox executor.
securingConnectionDesc: Please wait while we establish a secure gateway path. Do not close this tab.
readyProceedNext: You are ready to proceed to the next checkpoint.
allCheckpointsCompleted: All checkpoints completed! Click below to verify and unlock key.
savingLogs: Saving logs to database for verification:
recordedSuccessfully: Your verification has been recorded successfully. Click the button below to claim your key.
